Class ControllerServlet

java.lang.Object
jakarta.servlet.GenericServlet
jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServlet
pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.controller.ControllerServlet
All Implemented Interfaces:
jakarta.servlet.Servlet, jakarta.servlet.ServletConfig, Serializable
@WebServlet(name="MyServlet", urlPatterns="/Form") public class ControllerServlet extends jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServlet
ControllerServlet is a class that extends the HttpServlet and acts as a Controller for the RailFence application.
Version:
1.2
Author:
Magdalena Rapala
See Also:

    model - an instance of Model class, conducts the Rail Fence cipher.

    readFromCookies - a Boolean value regarding the initialization of stats being read from cookies.
    private String
    result
    result - the end result of the conducted cipher.
    private final HashMap<String,Integer>
    stats
    stats - is HashMap being used to count the events happening in the ControllerServlet.

  • Constructor Details

    • ControllerServlet

      public ControllerServlet()
      Constructor initiating statistics collection.

  • Method Details

    • processRequest

      protected void processRequest(jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request, jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse response) throws jakarta.servlet.ServletException, IOException, IllegalArgumentException, IncorrectNoOfRailsException
      Processes requests for both HTTP GET and POST methods.
      Parameters:
      request - servlet request
      response - servlet response
      Throws:
      jakarta.servlet.ServletException - if a servlet-specific error occurs.
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs.
      IllegalArgumentException - when there is some error regarding the cipher arguments.
      IncorrectNoOfRailsException - if an error regarding the number of rails occurs.

    • persistObject

      void persistObject(Object object) throws jakarta.persistence.PersistenceException
      persistObject is a method which takes the object and saves it into the database.
      Parameters:
      object - that is to be saved into the database.
      Throws:
      jakarta.persistence.PersistenceException - when something goes wrong with the transaction.

    • findCipherObjects

      public List<CipherParams> findCipherObjects(String mode, String text, int numberOfRails) throws jakarta.persistence.PersistenceException
      findCipherObjects is a method which by given parameters searches the database and returns the object with equal parameters.
      Parameters:
      mode - the mode of the cipher operation - either Encryption or Decryption (en, de).
      text - the input text for the cipher.
      numberOfRails - the number of rails for the cipher.
      Returns:
      the list of all CipherParams which satisfy the equal parameters requirement.
      Throws:
      jakarta.persistence.PersistenceException - when something goes wrong with the transaction.

    • findLinkedHResult

      public List<ResultHistory> findLinkedHResult(CipherParams cipherParams) throws jakarta.persistence.PersistenceException
      findLinkedHResult is a method that takes the CipherParams object and returns a list (one) of ResultHistory linked to that object.
      Parameters:
      cipherParams - is the object for which the linked ResultHistory is returned.
      Returns:
      the ResultHistory linked to the param.
      Throws:
      jakarta.persistence.PersistenceException - when something goes wrong with the transaction.

    • doGet

      protected void doGet(jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request, jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse response) throws jakarta.servlet.ServletException, IOException
      Handles the HTTP GET method.
      Overrides:
      doGet in class jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServlet
      Parameters:
      request - servlet request
      response - servlet response
      Throws:
      jakarta.servlet.ServletException - if a servlet-specific error occurs
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs

    • getServletInfo

      public String getServletInfo()
      Returns a short description of the servlet.
      Specified by:
      getServletInfo in interface jakarta.servlet.Servlet
      Overrides:
      getServletInfo in class jakarta.servlet.GenericServlet
      Returns:
      a String containing servlet description
